para_trans: Government Decision No: Finance-2025 / P.No.90 / Rehabilitation-6 (R-8)
The following instructions / conditions should be strictly enforced by all concerned in accordance with financial discipline.
1) The Divisional Commissioner, Pune, has directed that the funds received by him under this order be transferred to the concerned Controlling Officer.
Therefore, the Superintending Engineer, S.B.Board, Pune has the Budget Distribution System (BEAMS).
be delivered immediately.
2) Funds are provided by the Rehabilitation Department of the Government for civic amenities works.
Hence, the concerned Irrigation Development Corporation to pay the dues for the civic amenities works.
No permission / approval is required.
3) The funds sanctioned and received under this order are spent on the sanctioned civic amenities works only.
to be made and in any case beyond the grant sanctioned at the time of expenditure of the said fund.
The executive engineer should make sure that there will not be too much expense.
4) Related projects so that the sanctioned funds are not spent on works other than those sanctioned by the Government.
Officers should be on the lookout.
